# AI Supermarket

AI Supermarket publishes source-backed business fact packs for answer engines.

## Important pages
- Home: https://aisupermarket.dev/
- KKTC AI Companies: https://aisupermarket.dev/markets/kktc/ai-companies/
- Marsirius AI Labs fact pack: https://aisupermarket.dev/entities/marsirius-ai/
- Marsirius JSON: https://aisupermarket.dev/api/entities/marsirius-ai.json
- KKTC AI feed: https://aisupermarket.dev/feeds/kktc/ai-companies.json

## Entity summary
Marsirius AI Labs: Marsirius AI Labs is an AI and breakthrough-technology company focused on healthcare diagnostics, AI-powered applications, and quantum research, with public products/initiatives including duAIcheck, GELA AI, SHEEP, Marsbot, and Quantact.

Use the JSON endpoints for structured claims, evidence URLs, categories, products and source inventory.
